Command: run
Scenario: example-scenario
Status: failed

Stages:
- run/iteration_1_generate: pass
- run/iteration_1_test: fail
- run/iteration_1_validate: pass
- run/iteration_2_generate: pass
- run/iteration_2_test: fail
- run/iteration_2_validate: pass
- run/metadata: pass (run_id=<RUN_ID>)
- run/mode: pass (clean (missing mockway state, terraform.tfstate, previous successful run))
- run/terminal_reason: pass (stuck)

Failures:
- run/iteration_1_test check=credentials command="test" detail="sandbox deploy requires SCW_ACCESS_KEY in the environment"
- run/iteration_2 check=stuck command="run loop" detail="stopped due to stuck detection"
- run/iteration_2_test check=credentials command="test" detail="sandbox deploy requires SCW_ACCESS_KEY in the environment"

Explainability:
- run/iteration_1_test check=credentials summary="Layer 3 real Scaleway deploy is enabled but credentials are unavailable" action="set SCW_ACCESS_KEY and SCW_SECRET_KEY before enabling sandbox_deploy"
- run/iteration_2 check=stuck summary="criteria check failed and requires scenario/harness inspection" action="review failure detail and criteria definition for this check"
- run/iteration_2_test check=credentials summary="Layer 3 real Scaleway deploy is enabled but credentials are unavailable" action="set SCW_ACCESS_KEY and SCW_SECRET_KEY before enabling sandbox_deploy"
Usage:
  run <scenario> [flags]

Flags:
      --clean                       
      --config string                (default "./infrafactory.yaml")
  -h, --help                        help for run
      --no-destroy                  
      --output string                (default "human")
      --repair-iterations-max int   
      --reset-mocks
